untranslatable_reason: Signal requires manual angled trendline construction across lows (support) and highs (resistance). These are not pre-calculated indicators in the allowed set. Donchian channels used as proxy for dynamic support/resistance, but true trendline slope and touch-point validation cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'breakout above resistance' as price crossing above Donchian upper band (dc_upper) and 'come back to test' as crossing back below. Used sma_20 as trend confirmation. Angled trendlines require custom calculation not available in standard indicator library.
